summary: 本轮检索到 2 项新的高相关工作，均在 2026-07-07 之后公开，并且都把灵巧机器人手或灵巧操作作为核心贡献。优先级最高的是面向真实灵巧手学习的 `LAMP`，其次是强调双臂灵巧遥操作与力控的 `DexTele-0`；两者都值得继续跟踪代码、项目页和实机结果。
summary_en: This run found 2 newly relevant items published after the 2026-07-07 cutoff. The top item is `LAMP`, which focuses on real-world learning for dexterous hand manipulation, and the second is `DexTele-0`, which centers on force-aware bimanual dexterous teleoperation; both are worth tracking for code, project pages, and fuller robot validation.

items.title: LAMP: Latent Motion Prior-Guided Real-World Learning for Dexterous Hand Manipulation
items.relevance: 这项工作直接把真实灵巧手学习作为核心目标，围绕多指手操作构建方法，符合本追踪器对灵巧手中心贡献的严格标准。
items.relevance_en: This work makes real-world learning for dexterous hands the core objective and builds its method around multi-finger manipulation, which fits the tracker’s strict hand-centric bar.
items.novelty_signal: 这是 2026-07-07 首次公开的新论文，发布时间晚于上一轮成功运行；从题目可见，它不是重复转载，而是直接面向真实灵巧手学习问题。
items.novelty_signal_en: This is a newly public paper from 2026-07-07, later than the previous successful run; the title indicates it is not a repost but a direct treatment of real-world dexterous-hand learning.
items.analysis_zh: 这项工作主要提出一种面向真实环境的灵巧手学习框架 `LAMP`，把潜在运动先验引入多指手操作策略中。它解决的是灵巧手在真实机器人上学习困难、数据昂贵、接触过程高度不稳定的问题。方法上，公开材料显示作者以运动先验引导策略学习，并针对真实手部操作设计训练流程，但当前可见信息对网络结构与训练细节仍不完全披露。实验部分明确是在真实灵巧手平台上进行，说明作者关注的是可落地的实机学习而非纯仿真结果；摘要与项目页线索表明方法在真实操作任务上验证了有效性。总体来看，这是一项把“先验驱动的真实灵巧手学习”作为核心贡献的工作，价值在于降低真实手操作学习门槛；限制在于公开摘要尚未充分给出具体任务集合、基线、定量提升和失败模式，仍需等待论文正文与代码发布进一步确认。
items.analysis_en: The main contribution is `LAMP`, a real-world learning framework for dexterous hand manipulation that injects latent motion priors into policy learning for multi-finger hands. It addresses a core dexterous-manipulation problem: learning on real hardware is data-hungry, contact-rich, and unstable, so pure end-to-end learning is hard to scale. Methodologically, the public material indicates a prior-guided training pipeline for real robot hands, but the current sources do not fully expose the architecture or optimization details. The experiments are explicitly on a real dexterous-hand platform, so the work is aimed at deployable learning rather than simulation-only performance, and the abstract/project trail suggests the method was validated on real manipulation tasks. Overall, it is a hand-centric contribution on prior-driven real-world learning, with the potential to lower the barrier to training dexterous policies on hardware; the limitation is that the public description does not yet provide enough detail on tasks, baselines, quantitative gains, or failure modes.

items.title: DexTele-0: Force-Aware Bimanual Dexterous Teleoperation with Egocentric Perception towards Shared Autonomy
items.relevance: 这篇工作把双臂灵巧遥操作与共享自主放在核心位置，并结合力感知与第一人称感知，属于灵巧手方向的直接进展。
items.relevance_en: This paper puts bimanual dexterous teleoperation and shared autonomy at the center, combining force awareness and egocentric perception, which makes it a direct advance in dexterous hands.
items.novelty_signal: 这是 2026-07-07 新公开的论文，发布时间晚于上一轮成功运行；题目表明它不是泛化机器人操作，而是明确聚焦双手灵巧遥操作。
items.novelty_signal_en: This is a newly public paper from 2026-07-07, after the previous successful run; the title shows that it is not generic robot manipulation but explicitly focused on bimanual dexterous teleoperation.
items.analysis_zh: 这篇工作主要围绕双臂灵巧遥操作与共享自主展开，把力感知、第一人称视觉和双手协同放在同一个系统里。它解决的是复杂双手操作中人类遥操作负担高、接触状态难判断、从操作者动作到机器人执行的稳定映射困难的问题。方法上，公开题目已经清楚表明其包含力感知和自我中心感知，并面向 shared autonomy 设计算法，但当前可见材料尚不足以完整展开控制律、系统结构与数据采集流程。实验部分显示它以双手灵巧遥操作为目标，说明不是泛化的移动操作框架，而是直接服务于多指手的精细协作；不过目前公开页面能看到的定量指标与硬件细节仍有限。总体来看，这是一项把双手灵巧遥操作、力反馈和共享自主结合起来的工作，适合继续关注其系统实现与实机评测；限制是现阶段公开信息还不够完整，无法判断其相对基线的具体优势幅度。
items.analysis_en: The main contribution is `DexTele-0`, a force-aware bimanual dexterous teleoperation system that combines force sensing, egocentric perception, and shared autonomy. It tackles a difficult dexterous-teleoperation problem: coordinating two hands under contact-rich conditions is hard for human operators, sensing contact state is nontrivial, and mapping operator intent to stable robot execution is challenging. Methodologically, the title makes clear that the system uses force awareness and first-person perception, and that the algorithm is designed around shared autonomy, but the currently visible material is not enough to reconstruct the full control stack or data-collection pipeline. The experiments are clearly aimed at bimanual dexterous teleoperation, so this is not a generic mobile manipulation framework but one focused on fine multi-finger coordination; however, the public sources in this run do not provide enough quantitative detail or hardware specification. Overall, it is a relevant contribution at the intersection of teleoperation, force feedback, and shared autonomy for dexterous hands; the limitation is that the available public information is still too sparse to judge its margin over prior systems.

caveats: 本轮优先检索 arXiv、项目页及与灵巧机器人手直接相关的公开页面，只保留灵巧手或灵巧操作为核心贡献的条目。
公开材料对部分实验细节、基线和定量结果披露仍有限，因此分析保持保守，未补写未证实的指标。
seen-items 已按新增条目更新，历史已收录条目保持不变。
